title: Action
description: An Action is the core verb of a business domain — something that can be performed on or by a Resource. Actions describe the operations that drive the business forward and produce meaningful state changes.

name.description: The PascalCase name of the action, expressed as a verb.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this action does.
examples: Approves a pending loan application and marks it as active.
Ships an order and notifies the customer with a tracking number.

resource.description: The name of the Resource this action belongs to.

input.description: The attributes required as input to perform this action.

output.description: The attributes returned or updated as a result of this action.

examples.name: Approve
examples.description: Approves a pending loan application and marks it as active.

examples.name: Ship
examples.description: Ships an order and notifies the customer with a tracking number.

examples.name: Terminate
examples.description: Ends an employee's employment with the organization.
